creator: ports@encarnate.com
text:
After playing with this a bit more i have a few additional cleanup 
items...  I am open to maintaining this port if need be.

# diff -ruN Makefile.orig Makefile
--- Makefile.orig       2008-03-03 00:22:53.000000000 -0600
+++ Makefile    2008-02-28 01:22:00.000000000 -0600
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@
 
 .if defined(WITH_APACHE)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=       --enable-apache
-BUILD_DEPENDS+=                curl.4:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
+LIB_DEPENDS+=          curl.4:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
 PLIST_SUB+=            APACHE=""
 .else
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=       --disable-apache

# diff -ruN files/collectd.sh.in.orig files/collectd.sh.in
--- files/collectd.sh.in.orig   2008-03-03 00:25:02.000000000 -0600
+++ files/collectd.sh.in        2008-03-02 10:55:24.000000000 -0600
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@
 rcvar=`set_rcvar`
 
 command="%%PREFIX%%/sbin/collectdmon"
+command_args="-c %%PREFIX%%/sbin/collectd"
 pidfile="/var/run/${name}mon.pid"
 required_files="%%PREFIX%%/etc/$name.conf"
